metadata.description: Skills for My New Agent AI automation agency - client onboarding, SOP mapping, proposal generation, and meeting prep.

plugins.name: client-onboarding
plugins.description: End-to-end client onboarding workflow: client setup, SOP documentation, process flow diagrams, scoping proposals, and speaking notes.

plugins.name: brand-voice-generator
plugins.description: Define and maintain the agency brand guide: writing voice, visual identity, colors, fonts, and logo usage.

plugins.name: pdf-delivery
plugins.description: Convert any markdown deliverable to a branded PDF for client delivery.

plugins.name: google-workspace
plugins.description: Google Workspace integration: Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Tasks, Contacts, Forms, Keep, Classroom, Admin, and cross-service workflows via the gws CLI.
